title: Cookie Policy
heading: Cookie Policy
intro: This website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve functionality, analytics, and advertising services.

sections.heading: What Are Cookies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when visiting websites.
They help websites remember information about your visit, improve performance, and support certain website features.

sections.heading: How Cookies Are Used
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios may use cookies for website functionality, analytics, performance monitoring, and advertising.
Some third-party services integrated into the website may also use cookies or similar technologies.

sections.heading: Google AdSense
paragraphs: This website may display advertisements provided by Google AdSense.
Google and its partners may use cookies to display personalised or non-personalised advertisements based on your browsing activity and interests.
Google may use advertising cookies to measure ad performance and improve advertising services.

sections.heading: Analytics
paragraphs: Analytics services may collect anonymous usage information such as page visits, device types, browser information, and general website interactions.
This information helps improve website performance and user experience.

sections.heading: Managing Cookies
paragraphs: Most web browsers allow you to control or disable cookies through browser settings.
Disabling cookies may affect certain website functionality or features.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
paragraphs: Third-party providers such as Google, Apple, analytics platforms, or social media services may apply their own cookies and privacy technologies when interacting with this website.
These services operate under their own privacy and cookie policies.

sections.heading: Policy Updates
paragraphs: This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically as website features, analytics, or advertising services evolve.
